name: Verify that user can successfully log in with valid credentials

parameters.name: bodyRequest
parameters.value: CreateProjectRequest(title=Fay-Schaden, code=QA49, description=Accusantium et error et odit voluptas., access=all, group=QA)

parameters.name: bodyRequest
parameters.value: CreateProjectRequest(title=Gleason, West and Carroll, code=QA75, description=Assumenda sed officia., access=all, group=DEV)

parameters.name: bodyRequest
parameters.value: CreateProjectRequest(title=Romaguera-Gottlieb, code=QA98, description=Dolor rerum id qui., access=group, group=MANUAL)

parameters.name: bodyRequest
parameters.value: CreateProjectRequest(title=Blick, Kertzmann and Corwin, code=QA86, description=Itaque modi dolores qui unde., access=all, group=DEV)

parameters.name: bodyRequest
parameters.value: CreateProjectRequest(title=Larson-Barton, code=QA29, description=Dolor quis et reiciendis assumenda deserunt ut., access=all, group=DEV)

parameters.name: bodyRequest
parameters.value: CreateProjectRequest(title=Hermann, Kuhlman and O'Conner, code=QA56, description=Id ut omnis blanditiis rerum., access=all, group=MANUAL)

steps.name: Check that login page is opened
$("by text: Log in to your account") should be(visible (because Login page title should be displayed when login page is opened))
Check that projects page is opened

labels.name: story
labels.value: User logs in with valid credentials
